_comment: Tier-2 for fenics biharmonic#: dolfinx 0.10 distinguishes fem.functionspace (lowercase factory function — the user-facing API) from fem.FunctionSpace (capitalised ABC class). Direct call to the capital form raises TypeError: FunctionSpace.__init__() missing 1 required positional argument: 'cppV'. This catches LLM agents trained on legacy dolfin tutorials that show FunctionSpace(mesh, ...) as the canonical name. Verified empirically 2026-06-01 (dolfinx 0.10.0).
